exercises.title: System Performance Calculator
exercises.description: Build a comprehensive QKD system performance calculator.
tasks: Model link budget with component losses
Calculate expected QBER from system parameters
Estimate secret key rate at various distances
hints: Total loss = fiber + connectors + splices + system
QBER includes optical errors + dark counts
Key rate = raw × sifting × secret fraction
Consider detector efficiency and dead time

exercises.title: Deployment Cost Estimator
exercises.description: Create a tool to estimate QKD deployment costs.
tasks: Define cost models for different configurations

exercises.title: Detector Selection Tool
exercises.description: Build a detector selection recommendation system.
tasks: Define selection criteria for different applications
hints: Key specs: efficiency, dark counts, jitter, dead time
Match to application: distance, rate, security level

exercises.title: Standards Compliance Checker
exercises.description: Create a tool to assess QKD system compliance with standards.
hints: ETSI GS QKD 008 for security specs
